common.tagline: Check how ready your site is for Google's new search and ads rules

landing.heroTitle: Is your site ready for Google's new rules?
landing.heroSubtitle: One URL — a full readiness score for AI search (AI Overviews, E-E-A-T, Core Web Vitals) and Google Ads landing page quality.

errors.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid public website URL.
errors.rateLimited: Free audit limit reached for today. Try again tomorrow.

seo.title: AI search readiness
seo.body: E-E-A-T signals, AI Overview citability, Core Web Vitals, structured data and indexability — everything Google's new ranking systems look at.

ads.title: Ads landing quality
ads.body: Quality Score factors: speed, mobile experience, trust signals, contact info, privacy policy and misleading-content markers.

actionable.title: Actionable report
actionable.body: Not just a score: every check comes with a concrete recommendation you can hand to a developer.

failedReasons.unreachable: We couldn't reach this site. Check the URL and try again.
failedReasons.blocked: The site blocks automated requests. That itself can hurt Google's crawler too.
failedReasons.non_html: This URL doesn't return an HTML page.
failedReasons.internal: Something went wrong on our side. Please try again.

steps.psi_mobile: Running PageSpeed (mobile) — this takes up to a minute

cwv-lcp.name: Largest Contentful Paint (LCP)
cwv-lcp.rec: Get LCP under 2.5s: optimize the hero image, use a CDN, preload critical resources.

cwv-inp.name: Interaction to Next Paint (INP)
cwv-inp.rec: Keep INP under 200ms: break up long JavaScript tasks and defer non-critical scripts.

cwv-cls.name: Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS)
cwv-cls.rec: Reserve space for images, ads and embeds so content doesn't jump while loading.

psi-performance.name: Lighthouse performance (mobile)
psi-performance.rec: Follow PageSpeed Insights suggestions: compress images, reduce JavaScript, enable caching.

ttfb.name: Server response time (TTFB)
ttfb.rec: Aim for under 800ms: add server caching or move to faster hosting / a CDN.

https.name: HTTPS
https.rec: Serve the site over HTTPS and redirect all HTTP traffic. This is a hard requirement for both ranking and ads.

image-optimization.name: Image optimization
image-optimization.rec: Serve images in WebP/AVIF and size them appropriately.

render-blocking.name: Render-blocking resources
render-blocking.rec: Inline critical CSS and defer non-critical CSS/JS.

html-size.name: HTML document size
html-size.rec: Keep HTML under 500KB; move inline data and scripts out of the document.

http-status.name: HTTP status & redirects
http-status.rec: The page should answer 200 with at most one redirect hop.

robots-allowed.name: robots.txt allows Googlebot
robots-allowed.rec: Make sure robots.txt doesn't block Googlebot from this URL.

meta-noindex.name: No noindex directive
meta-noindex.rec: Remove the noindex robots meta tag / X-Robots-Tag header if this page should rank.

canonical.name: Canonical URL
canonical.rec: Add a self-referencing canonical link, or make sure it points at the preferred URL.

sitemap.name: XML sitemap
sitemap.rec: Provide a sitemap.xml, reference it in robots.txt and include this URL.

crawlable-links.name: Crawlable links
crawlable-links.rec: Use real <a href> links so Google can discover your pages.

lang-attribute.name: Language attribute
lang-attribute.rec: Set <html lang="…"> to the page language.

jsonld-present.name: JSON-LD structured data
jsonld-present.rec: Add JSON-LD markup — structured data feeds Google's AI search features directly.

jsonld-errors.name: Structured data validity
jsonld-errors.rec: Fix malformed JSON-LD blocks; broken markup is ignored by Google.

jsonld-org-or-website.name: Organization / WebSite markup
jsonld-org-or-website.rec: Add Organization or WebSite JSON-LD with name and url — a key trust signal.

jsonld-page-type.name: Page-type markup
jsonld-page-type.rec: Mark the page up as Article, Product, FAQPage etc. so AI search can classify it.

og-twitter-meta.name: Open Graph / social meta
og-twitter-meta.rec: Add og:title, og:description and og:image for rich sharing previews.

title-tag.name: Title tag
title-tag.rec: Write a unique 15–65 character title that matches the page's main promise.

meta-description.name: Meta description
meta-description.rec: Add a 50–160 character description summarizing the page.

h1.name: H1 heading
h1.rec: Use exactly one H1 that states what the page is about.

content-depth.name: Content depth
content-depth.rec: Thin pages rank poorly and get skipped by AI search. Aim for 300+ words of substantive content.

image-alt.name: Image alt texts
image-alt.rec: Describe content images with alt attributes.

author-byline.name: Author attribution
author-byline.rec: Show who wrote the content (byline + Person markup) — core E-E-A-T signal.

freshness.name: Content freshness
freshness.rec: Show a visible publish/update date and add datePublished/dateModified markup.

about-contact-pages.name: About & contact pages
about-contact-pages.rec: Link to About and Contact pages — Google uses them to assess site trustworthiness.

heading-structure.name: Heading hierarchy
heading-structure.rec: Don't skip heading levels (H2 → H4); a clean outline helps AI extract answers.

llm-eeat.name: AI: E-E-A-T signals
llm-eeat.rec: Demonstrate first-hand experience and expertise: credentials, sources, real examples.

llm-helpfulness.name: AI: Helpful content
llm-helpfulness.rec: Make content people-first: answer the visitor's question fully instead of writing for keywords.

llm-ai-citability.name: AI: Citability in AI Overviews
llm-ai-citability.rec: Give direct, extractable answers: clear definitions, facts in text (not images), Q&A-shaped sections.

llm-clarity-structure.name: AI: Structure & clarity
llm-clarity-structure.rec: Make the page scannable: descriptive headings, short paragraphs, lists and tables.

ads-contact-info.name: Contact information
ads-contact-info.rec: Show a phone number, email or contact page — Google Ads requires reachable advertisers.

ads-privacy-policy.name: Privacy policy & terms
ads-privacy-policy.rec: Link to a privacy policy; collecting leads without one violates Google Ads policy.

ads-speed.name: Landing page speed
ads-speed.rec: Slow landing pages lower Quality Score and raise CPC. Optimize mobile speed first.

ads-mobile-usability.name: Mobile usability
ads-mobile-usability.rec: Make tap targets and fonts comfortable on mobile devices.

ads-interstitial-heuristic.name: Intrusive popups
ads-interstitial-heuristic.rec: Avoid full-screen popups on landing — they hurt both ads experience and mobile ranking.

ads-cta-form.name: Call to action
ads-cta-form.rec: Add a clear CTA: a form, a phone link or a prominent action button.

ads-trust-signals.name: Trust signals
ads-trust-signals.rec: Add business identity: organization markup, a physical address, HTTPS.

ads-broken-links.name: Broken links
ads-broken-links.rec: Fix broken internal links — they degrade landing page experience.

ads-popunder-redirect.name: Redirects & meta-refresh
ads-popunder-redirect.rec: Avoid cross-domain redirects and meta-refresh — both are Google Ads destination violations.

llm-ads-relevance.name: AI: Ad relevance & honesty
llm-ads-relevance.rec: Match the above-fold promise to the actual offer; remove fake urgency and unverifiable claims.
